description: After replacing a tire on an aircraft, a mechanic must create a formal entry in the aircraft's official logbook.

nodes.task_description: Identify the aircraft tail number and the date of the maintenance action.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the aircraft and date.

nodes.task_description: Write a clear and concise description of the work performed: 'Removed and replaced No. 3 main landing gear tire due to wear'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent writes a description that meets regulatory standards.

nodes.task_description: Make the logbook entry, including the part number of the new tire and a reference to the maintenance manual task, and apply a digital signature.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a complete, compliant, and signed logbook entry.
